description: CompositionBlack and red flip flops with rubber insole and embossed logo, EVA midsole and TPR outsole, double layer strap with embroidered logo and twill tape toe separatorsCare1. Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washEnjoy summer in these sleek black flip flops with red detailing from spalding. The bright red embossed logo adds an edge of cool to the footwear. The black insole is soft and the red EVA midsole makes the footwear lightweight and cushioned. The wide straps ensure a snug Fit and the twill tape toe separators give added comfort. The TPR outsole with a honeycomb pattern and circular logo seal gives the footwear better grip.
